hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Mandrill in the wild
hero.caption: The Mandrill is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Mandrill navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Mandrill finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Mandrill.

baby.alt: A young or baby Mandrill showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Mandrills must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Mandrills interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Mandrills interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Mandrill traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Mandrill
size.caption: The size of a Mandrill can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Mandrill
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Mandrill's body.

fun-fact.alt: A Mandrill showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Mandrill has amazing features that help it survive?

core-habitat.alt: A Mandrill navigating its natural environment
core-habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

core-diet.alt: A mandrill nibbling a flower it is holding in its hand
core-diet.caption: Mandrills forage for fruit, seeds, leaves, and flowers, using their hands to bring food to their mouths.

core-closeup.alt: Close-up of an adult male mandrill's brightly colored red and blue face
core-closeup.caption: The vivid red and blue face of a dominant male mandrill — its bright colors help mandrills recognize and communicate with each other.

core-family.alt: A group of Mandrills interacting with each other
core-family.caption: While often solitary, some Mandrills interact with others of their species.

core-baby.alt: A young or baby Mandrill showing early development
core-baby.caption: Baby Mandrills must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

core-range.alt: A Mandrill traveling across its geographic range
core-range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.
